title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 6
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students talking about sports practice.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are we still meeting in the sports hall for basketball practice? I wrote it in my diary, but I left my phone at home this morning. || Girl: That was the original plan, but workers are repairing the lights inside today. [1]We need to meet on the outdoor court instead[/1]. || Boy: I am glad I asked. I would have gone to the wrong place and wondered where everyone was. || Girl: That is all right. I will arrive ten minutes early, so look for me near the entrance. Keep your phone on in case anything changes again.
items.question: Where will basketball practice be?
items.explanation: Practice will be on the outdoor court.

items.context: You hear two friends preparing for a cycling trip.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you packed for the cycling trip yet? I put a map in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Boy: That was on the first list, but the route is signposted but the weather will be hot. [2]Everyone needs to bring a bottle of water now[/2]. || Girl: I would have taken the wrong thing otherwise. I was about to leave my bag by the door and forget about it. || Boy: Do not worry; we are not leaving yet. Put it in now, and check the final message once more before we leave tomorrow morning.
items.question: What should the speaker take?

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a rainy afternoon.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still having a picnic in the park this afternoon? I told my sister I would be home later, so I need to know. || Man: That was the idea, but the forecast now says it will rain all day. [3]We are going to play table tennis at the leisure centre instead[/3]. || Woman: Fine by me. I nearly paid for the other activity online this morning. || Man: Luckily you asked first. I will book our places this evening and send you the time. We can meet at the bus stop after lunch.
items.question: What will they do this afternoon?
items.explanation: They decide to play table tennis indoors.

items.context: You hear two people discussing a doctor's appointment.
items.audio_script: Man: I need to write down the time for the doctor's appointment. Is it still at two o'clock, like you said yesterday? || Woman: No, the doctor is attending a meeting after lunch. [4]It starts at twenty to three now[/4], although we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Man: I am glad I checked. I would have been waiting there at the wrong time. || Woman: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go home again before it begins.
items.question: What time is the appointment?
items.explanation: The appointment starts at twenty to three.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a camera.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting on with your camera? I heard it was not working properly. || Boy: I first thought the lens was scratched, and my brother wondered if the memory card was full. But he checked it carefully last night. [5]The battery will not charge any more[/5]. || Girl: Can it be fixed before the family holiday next week? || Boy: It should be possible. We know what is wrong now, and the repair shop said it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief because I need it this weekend.
items.question: What is wrong with the camera?
items.explanation: The camera battery will not charge.

items.context: You hear two people travelling to the town centre.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are you still travelling to the town centre by car? I could meet you when you arrive. || Man: I planned to, but there will be nowhere to park during the festival. I considered going by train, but the station is too far from the shops. [6]I am going by bus instead[/6]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. What time will you get there? || Man: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I have already checked the timetable online, so it should be easy. I will message you when I leave, so you do not have to wait outside.
items.question: How will they travel to the town centre?
items.explanation: They choose to go by bus.

items.context: You hear two people getting drinks for a picnic.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you buy some juice for the picnic? I saw one in the shop window yesterday and thought it looked nice. || Woman: No. I looked at some juice, and I nearly chose a bag of apples, but everyone said they would prefer a cold drink without sugar. [7]I bought a large bottle of water in the end[/7]. || Man: That sounds like a good choice. It sounds more useful, and I think it will be appreciated. || Woman: I hope so. I kept the receipt, just in case it needs changing after we give it.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker bought a large bottle of water.
